strengths: Successfully completed all six object transfers without dropping any items
Maintained consistent mid-air transfers without using the pegboard for support
Demonstrated good bilateral coordination throughout the exercise
weaknesses: Completion time of 189 seconds is significantly above the novice target range
Visible hesitation and repositioning during object handoffs
Inconsistent grasp positioning leading to multiple regrasping attempts

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on smooth handoffs between instruments.
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent grasp positioning and hesitation during transfers.

drills.name: Nondominant pickup rehearsal
drills.description: Spend 3 minutes practicing first-hand pickups using the nondominant hand only to build confidence.
drills.targets_weakness: Multiple regrasping attempts and positioning uncertainty.

progression_note: At the novice level, prioritize smooth, confident transfers over speed. Focus on establishing a consistent pickup and release technique before working on time reduction.
